meta.title: Tracking — your training consistency, week after week
meta.description: Total sessions, cumulative time, current week, active program. The dashboard to see whether you're sticking with it.

hero.title: Consistency is what pays.
hero.subtitle: How many sessions this week? How many hours this month? Where are you on your program? The dashboard to see in black and white if you're sticking with it — and to course-correct before you quit.

benefits.totals_body: Cumulative counter since day one, total time and average duration. The score that reminds you you've already built something.
benefits.week_body: WeekDots (one dot per day), weekly volume, contextual message based on your activity. You see whether you're on a roll or slipping.
benefits.program_body: If you're following a program, its progress is built into the dashboard. Completed sessions, next session, shortcut to launch it.
benefits.history_body: List of recently completed sessions with date and format. To remember what you did — and revisit if needed.

final_cta.title: See in black and white that you're sticking with it.
final_cta.subtitle: Create a free account, finish your first session, and watch consistency take root.
